theme: work recap — what we shipped this week (founder voice)
notes: SRC-FIXTURES sample: a work-recap run targeting the OPERATOR/founder-account slot (release-spec §3.3 flexible founder voice). The work-recap source reads the CONFIGURED memory path (here the synthetic fixtures/work-recap-acme/ memory via tests/helpers/fake-memory-reader.js), runs the redaction pre-pass + private-terms deny list, and emits a pre-seed (§2.1). It does NOT bypass the chain: matcher -> brief -> writer -> the hybrid gate (incl. the privacy/leak check) -> package -> queue -> the HUMAN approval card. SAFE by default; nothing auto-publishes. Validates against schemas/inputs/operator-command.schema.json (RUN_SLOT requires slot_ref).
